text:
You are working on beads issue str-ncs: "Call-graph-aware fingerprint composition"

## Issue Details
Track fingerprint dependencies: if a callee's fingerprint changes, mark callers for re-exploration. Build and maintain dependency chain.

Depends on str-bmh (fingerprint comparison and merging - done).

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="str-ncs"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on your worktree branch — never touch main.

## Instructions
1. Follow CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md conventions
2. Read the existing fingerprint module (from str-bmh) and call_graph module
3. Extend fingerprinting to compose fingerprints across call graph edges
4. If a callee's fingerprint changes, propagate staleness to all transitive callers
5. Add unit tests and proptest coverage
6. Run quality gates: `cargo test` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` in shatter-core
7. Run `/pre-completion` before reporting done — include its output in your completion message
8. Push your branch: `git push -u origin HEAD`

When done, mark task #6 as completed via TaskUpdate and send a message to the team lead.

Track fingerprint dependencies: if a callee's fingerprint changes, mark callers for re-exploration. Build and maintain dependency chain. Depends on str-bmh (done). Run /pre-completion before reporting done.","assignedBy":"str-ncs","timestamp":"2026-03-07T23:25:46.247Z"}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1772925953870-3u9yvmf","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"REPO_ROOT=\"$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)\" && BRANCH_NAME=\"str-ncs\" && WORKTREE_DIR=\"$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME\" && if [ -d \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" ]; then echo \"Worktree already exists, reusing\"; else git worktree add \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" -b \"$BRANCH_NAME\"; fi && cd \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" && echo \"CWD: $(pwd)\" && echo \"Branch: $(git branch --show-current)\" && echo \"$(pwd)\" | grep -q '\\.claude/worktrees/' && echo \"WORKTREE VERIFIED\" || echo \"FATAL: NOT in a worktree\"","description":"Set up git worktree for str-ncs branch"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1772926941852-gelq20c","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"git add shatter-core/src/call_graph.rs shatter-core/src/fingerprint.rs && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: call-graph-aware fingerprint composition (str-ncs)

Add cross-file fingerprint composition using the CallGraph to resolve
callee dependencies across file boundaries, and transitive staleness
propagation so callers are marked stale when any transitive callee changes.

New in call_graph.rs:
- transitive_callers_of(): BFS on reverse adjacency for transitive caller closure

New in fingerprint.rs:
- FingerprintRegistry: cross-file registry of shallow/deep FPs keyed by qualified name
- compute_cross_file_deep_fingerprints(): uses CallGraph topological layers to compose
  deep FPs across files (leaves first, cycle-safe)
- StalenessReason / CrossFileIncrementalPlan: typed staleness analysis result
- compute_cross_file_staleness(): compares registries and propagates staleness
  transitively through the call graph

Includes unit tests (8 for transitive_callers, 12 for cross-file FPs/staleness)
and proptests (determinism, length invariant).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit changes"},"permission_updates":[]}}
